prompt: Create an “angry” mood variation of this exact pig character, only changing the face mood: small frown, slightly furrowed brows, pouty expression (cute, not scary or evil). Keep the same pose, proportions, line style, stroke thickness, and exact color palette (#FFB8BC, #FD7874, #4C0331, #FFFFFF, #FFC0C4). No new colors. Maintain a soft, kid-friendly look (no sharp or aggressive features). White background. Ensure it clearly matches the original character and same skin color.
